front: What are the clinical considerations for peptide drug immunogenicity?
back: Immunogenicity assessment: 1) Anti-drug antibody (ADA) screening (bridging ELISA), 2) Neutralizing antibody (NAb) assays, 3) T-cell epitope prediction (in silico), 4) Risk factors: non-human sequences, aggregation, route. Impact: reduced efficacy, injection site reactions, anaphylaxis. Mitigation: humanization, formulation.
